brief_notes: Outstanding numerical accuracy: all network parameters (N=5000, NE=4000, NI=1000, p=0.2), firing rates (5.2/20 Hz steady, 5.5/21 Hz critical, 7.8/26 Hz and 15/42 Hz after 5% increase), oscillation frequencies (~50 Hz simulated, 58 Hz predicted, ~55 Hz experimental), correlation peaks (+/-18 ms experimental, +/-20 ms model), neuron pair counts (978/368), DPX task parameters (69%/31%, 1000ms cue, 1000ms delay, 500ms probe), synaptic time constants, membrane parameters, and NMDAR Mg2+ block parameters all perfectly match extraction. Excellent table and figure organization with clear model-vs-experiment comparison.
